title: Evangelion Designs
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Designs?             Quote Post by Zenoseiya » Sat Jan 09, 2010 10:12 pm I was searching on google, and I found a chinese blog that has basic character sheets for models 02 to 06. Are these official? If so, could they be used as illustrations on the wiki? http://home.gamer.com.tw/blogDetail.php?owner=OguwaAsuka04&sn=3074

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Jan 09, 2010 10:26 pm Looks fan-made. That's not even Rebuild's version of Eva-02.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA X » Sat Jan 09, 2010 10:28 pm Fan made or not. That design of Unit 5 is 50x better than what we got.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jan 09, 2010 10:38 pm EVA X wrote: Fan made or not. That design of Unit 5 is 50x better than what we got.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Sat Jan 09, 2010 10:45 pm I would of perfered if Unit 05 had actual legs.The whole having wheels for feet thing kinda sucks.Especially when you cant use them just anywhere and need like special line things.And the Unit 02 it shows is indeed the wrong one.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA X » Sun Jan 10, 2010 4:44 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: EVA X wrote: Fan made or not. That design of Unit 5 is 50x better than what we got.

[]:             Quote Post by knightrous » Sun Jan 10, 2010 4:49 am I liked the Unit 05 designs, reminded me a bit of the Tachikoma from Ghost in the Shell

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sun Jan 10, 2010 5:15 am EVA X wrote: I'm not saying I dislike the Provisional design, but I preferred it to have the standard Evangelion look.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA X » Sun Jan 10, 2010 5:21 am SaltyJoe wrote: EVA X wrote: I'm not saying I dislike the Provisional design, but I preferred it to have the standard Evangelion look.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Jan 10, 2010 6:14 am EVA X wrote: the standard Evangelion look.

[]:             Quote Post by jayngfet » Sun Jan 10, 2010 3:36 pm 05 looks much better here. Now she can fight in places that aren't that one specific tunnel with special power lines.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA X » Sun Jan 10, 2010 8:47 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: EVA X wrote: the standard Evangelion look.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Jan 11, 2010 6:08 am EVA X wrote: But in doing so, to me, it doesn't really look like an Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Mon Jan 11, 2010 6:33 am Sure, that Unit 05 drawing looks nice (So does the others), but still...the lack of actual hands...ahem, bothers me a little[/spoiler]

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Mon Jan 11, 2010 2:54 pm It's pretty old, the guy drew them based on the first trailer.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Jan 11, 2010 4:02 pm Jinroh wrote: It's pretty old, the guy drew them based on the first trailer.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 11, 2010 4:26 pm BTW, you need a Pixiv account to see them... (I used to have one, but the bastards deleted it for some reason. Screw you, Pixiv.) Nothing to see here, folks, move along.
summary:
[]: Evangelion Designs?             Quote Post by Zenoseiya » Sat Jan 09, 2010 10:12 pm I was searching on google, and I found a chinese blog that has basic character sheets for models 02 to 06. Are these official? If so, could they be used as illustrations on the wiki? http://home.gamer.com.tw/blogDetail.php?owner=OguwaAsuka04&sn=3074

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat J
